description_long: This is a military-style cargo truck with a dark green cab and a large, canvas-covered cargo bed. The cab features a classic rounded design with a prominent hood, two side mirrors, and a pair of headlights integrated into the front grille. The cargo area is covered by a taut, arched canvas canopy, which is supported by a series of ribs and extends the full length of the bed. The truck rides on two axles with large, rugged tires suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The side panels of the cargo bed are solid, and the rear is enclosed by the canvas cover, suggesting secure transport of goods or personnel. The overall build is robust, with metal bodywork and utilitarian features typical of mid-20th-century utility trucks.
description: A dark green, military-style cargo truck with a rounded cab and a large, canvas-covered rear bed. The truck has rugged tires and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the rounded cab, and the arched canvas cargo cover.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded hood, grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the cab and cargo bed from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the canvas-covered cargo bed and the rear panel.
